name: Slither
pricing_notes: Open source (AGPL-3.0); Trail of Bits project; no API costs

performance.notes: Static analysis completes in seconds to minutes depending on contract complexity

agent_readiness.notes: Static analysis framework for Solidity smart contracts from Trail of Bits. 80+ detectors for vulnerabilities: reentrancy, integer overflow, unchecked return values, access control, uninitialized storage, etc. Python API for custom detector development. Printers for understanding contract structure and data flow. CI/CD integration. Industry standard for smart contract security audits. Used by auditors at Consensys, OpenZeppelin, etc.

gotchas: AGPL-3.0 license requires careful review for commercial tools
False positives require manual triage — not all findings are real bugs
Solidity version compatibility issues with newer compiler features
Some complex reentrancy patterns missed by static analysis
best_when: Smart contract security auditing (industry standard tool)
CI/CD integration for automated vulnerability scanning on every PR
Understanding complex contract data flows before audit
Writing custom detectors for project-specific security patterns
avoid_when: Dynamic security testing (use Echidna for fuzzing instead)
Runtime verification or symbolic execution (use Manticore)
summary: Slither is Trail of Bits' static analysis framework for Solidity smart contracts. 80+ vulnerability detectors (reentrancy, overflow, access control). Python API for custom detectors. Industry standard in smart contract security audits. Used by major audit firms. CI/CD integration for automated scanning. Best combined with Foundry fuzz testing for comprehensive security coverage.
